What We Do

Full-Spectrum Digital Engineering

From intelligent AI integrations to cloud-native architectures — we design and build software that drives real business outcomes.

🤖

Custom AI Integration

Embedding predictive analytics and generative AI directly into your business processes to drive unprecedented efficiency and intelligent automation.

☁️

Cloud-Native Architecture

Expert design of microservices and containerised applications on AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes — built for elastic scalability and zero downtime.

⚡

Full-Stack Excellence

High-performance React and Next.js frontends paired with secure, enterprise-grade Java and Spring Boot backends — tested end-to-end.

Flagship Product

Property Rental Management

Our SaaS platform simplifies the complete rental lifecycle — allowing property owners and managers to move from manual oversight to intelligent automation.

  • 💰
    Smart Financials
    Automated invoicing, payment tracking, and financial reporting from a single dashboard.
  • 👤
    AI-Powered Tenant Screening
    Advanced risk models evaluate tenant reliability and background checks automatically.
  • 🔧
    Maintenance Workflows
    Raise, assign, and resolve maintenance requests with vendor tracking and status updates.
  • 📊
    Portfolio Dashboard
    Live occupancy rates, revenue trends, and lease expiry alerts across all your properties.

About Us

Built to Engineer Your Future

Vayutrix represents the intersection of agility — Vayu, the Sanskrit word for wind — and a multifaceted matrix of technological solutions. We are a technology company focused on building intelligent, cloud-native applications that solve real-world business problems.

Based in India and serving a global market, our mission is to provide the most sophisticated digital tech stack — enabling businesses to automate the present and confidently engineer their future.

We don't just consult. We design, build, and ship production-grade software with deep engineering expertise at every level of the stack.

AI-First Thinking Cloud Native Enterprise Grade Production Ready India-Based, Global Reach
